title: eryngium caeruleum
intro: Eryngium caeruleum, also known as blue thistle or blue lobelia, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Eryngium caeruleum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions. Eryngium caeruleum can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile plant for various health remedies.
